channel.title: ViralDeals - Electronics Picks
channel.description: Curated trending electronics picks from Amazon India.

item.title: Best Earphones Under ₹449 💸
item.description:
Beat the heat with the perfect summer companion - Boat Bassheads 300C Earphones! These affordable wireless earphones come with 10mm drivers, an in-line microphone, and integrated controls for seamless music and call handling. With their signature sound and sturdy Type-C jack, you'll stay entertained all summer long. Worth buying for every music lover, get your pair today!
#SummerSale #EarphonesUnder449 #MusicLover
